analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet criticizes the US for denying a visa to Iran’s foreign minister to attend a UN Security Council meeting, alleging the US failed its obligations as UN host and urging it to facilitate attendance. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) – Applicable. The tweet portrays the US (the West) as hostile and failing international obligations, implying wrongful behavior toward a UN process. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Not present; the tweet does not mention China’s cooperative stance or benevolence. CH3 (China has an epic history) – Not relevant. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) – Not addressed; no discussion of China’s domestic political values. CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds) – Not addressed. CH6 (China is interesting culturally) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1 only.
